creator: hiten@uk.FreeBSD.org
text:
Does this happen of newer releases?  I have been using an SMP kernel for
more than
2 years without any problems, but it might be related to your Compaq
SmartArray 221 
controller card.

Try using a newer release, such as FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE or 4.5-RELEASE. 
I didn't
have any problems with 4.5-RELEASE on my test machine which has four
proccessors
on an Intel Server Board.

Regards,

-- 
 - Hiten Pandya
 - <hiten@uk.FreeBSD.org>
